profile.name: Manish Tiwari
profile.title: Full Stack Engineer
profile.bio: Full Stack Engineer with 4+ years of experience developing modern web applications and AI-driven systems. Experienced in building scalable backend services, interactive frontend applications, and integrating advanced AI technologies such as Retrieval Augmented Generation and agent-based AI systems.

journey.title: Software Development Engineer L1
journey.description: Developed AI-driven backend services and modern web applications including document intelligence systems and AI provider orchestration platforms.

journey.title: Software Engineer
journey.description: Led frontend and backend development for real-time communication platforms and web applications including WebRTC-based video conferencing systems.

journey.title: Associate Software Engineer
journey.description: Worked on verification and document processing platforms supporting Aadhaar, PAN, driving license and GST validations with OCR based data extraction.

journey.title: Full Stack Development
journey.description: Completed an intensive full-stack development program focused on modern web technologies and production-ready software engineering practices.

projects.title: PDF Parser with RAG
projects.description: AI-powered document processing system that extracts insights from PDFs using Retrieval Augmented Generation. Enables semantic search, contextual question answering, and automated knowledge extraction from large document sets.

metrics.label: Capability
metrics.value: 1000+ documents processed with AI semantic understanding

metrics.label: Automation
metrics.value: Reduced manual document analysis by ~70%

metrics.label: Use Case
metrics.value: Sub-second semantic search across large document sets

caseStudies.title: AI Provider Service
caseStudies.problem: Applications needed to integrate multiple AI providers while managing request routing, logging and auditing.
caseStudies.solution: Built a centralized orchestration service using Go, Redis and PostgreSQL to route requests to multiple LLM providers while maintaining logs and monitoring usage.
caseStudies.impact: 3+ AI providers integrated (OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic) • Handles 10K+ AI API requests per day • Reduced AI integration time by ~60% for new services • Centralized logging improved observability and debugging efficiency.

caseStudies.title: PDF Extraction Service
caseStudies.problem: Organizations needed faster ways to extract insights from large volumes of unstructured documents.
caseStudies.solution: Implemented a Retrieval Augmented Generation pipeline that converts PDFs into searchable embeddings and enables contextual question answering.
caseStudies.impact: 1000+ PDF documents processed into embeddings • Reduced manual document review time by ~70% • Enabled semantic search with sub-second response time • Improved knowledge retrieval accuracy for internal users.

caseStudies.title: HRMS Automation
caseStudies.problem: Manual HR workflows caused inefficiencies in leave management and document handling.
caseStudies.solution: Developed modules with authentication, role based access control and workflow automation within the HRMS platform.
caseStudies.impact: Automated 5+ HR workflows including leave scheduling and document generation • Reduced manual HR tasks by ~50% • Improved employee request processing time by ~40% • Secure RBAC system implemented for multiple organizational roles.

highlights: Built AI powered document intelligence systems
Developed multi provider LLM orchestration platforms
Experienced across full stack web and AI applications
